items.title: "I think I'm pretty diligent about my work," "There's a lot of behind the scenes stuff that goes on throughout the day that a lot of people don't see during the game. I was touching a mound probably every other day (during the WBC) just to make sure I was still getting my work in, still being ready for the games. So, I don't really feel too far behind"
